case_title: UTTER BRIAN KEITH et al VS MEIR VAUGHN et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $444.96 FILED BY UTTER BRIAN KEITH TRUMAN CHRISTIE BROOKE AS TO DEFENDANT MEIR VAUGHN MEIER ARABELLA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-27-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
